title: Computational Tools in EN-MME: Implicit and Explicit Finite-Element Simulations
author_string: Federico Carra, Giuditta Coladonato, Audrey Piccini, Joanna Sylwia Swieszek, Nikolina Vejnovic
abstract: This paper recalls the principles of the finite-element methods (FEM) theory and declines its application in the EN-MME group, for the numerical modelling and study of particle accelerator equipment. Implicit and explicit methods are compared, and practical examples of their use are given.
comment: 15 pages, contribution to the CAS - CERN Accelerator School: Mechanical & Materials Engineering for Particle Accelerators and Detectors, 2-15 June 2024, Sint-Michielsgestel, Netherlands
